description: Originally designed for boaters and fishermen to have a firm foot even on slippery surfaces, crocs has gone a long way in creating footwear for those who demand complete comfort. Replete with several benefits such as the shoe moulding to your feet using your body heat, it's a hot favourite for little feet.The speciality of these shoes are that they need to Fit loosely around the feet, such that neither the sides of the shoe nor the toe unit come in contact with the feet. Instead, there should be a quarter to half inch gap between the foot and the wall of the shoe, and you should be able to comfortably fit a finger between the heel and back strap.UpperEVA upper with textured inside for lightweight feel, comfort and durabilityEVA material that moulds to the foot shape offering ample ergonomic comfortPerforations on the forefoot for ventilation, to drain away water and to add jibbitz – decorations for your crocsBack strap to support the ankle and hold the foot in placeUpper moulded to midsole for comfort and protection of feet from abrasionBroad EVA lining along the midsole for enhanced durabilityBrand button on upper for styleMidsoleEVA footbed with horizontal and foot shaped lines for ergonomic comfort and acupressureCrocs branding on the back heelFungus, bacteria and odour resistant for a healthy wear even in wet conditionsMild heel cup on the footbed to support the heelOutsoleSlip resistant outsole with multi-directional textured grooves in the forefoot and backfootShoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust
